summary_from_search: Next earnings report approximately May 20-27, 2026 after market close (exact date varies by source; May 27 most cited). Q1 FY2027 earnings. EPS estimate: $1.74-1.75 per share. Revenue estimate: ~$78.78B. Analyst consensus strong Buy going into print.
